tldr: Dorian Godon took the 3.2 km Villars-sur-Glâne prologue for INEOS Grenadiers, ahead of Søderqvist and Oliveira. Pogačar opened sixth at +7s — a deliberate conservative opener for the team's protected card.

narrative.headline: Godon by six seconds
narrative.body: 3.2 km city-centre ITT in Villars-sur-Glâne. Godon's TT power matched the technical short course; Pogačar deliberately conservative.

gcImpact.headline: Godon in yellow for a day

riderPerformances.name: Tadej Pogačar
riderPerformances.narrative: Deliberately conservative TT to open the week. The climbing days starting Stage 1 would settle GC.
